title: Evangelions redundancy in the West
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion's redundancy in the West             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Aug 06, 2010 3:31 pm We already have our Shinji Ikari:

[]: I come to you as a prophet of sarcasm. Kneel before me.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Fri Aug 06, 2010 3:52 pm This thread is destined for great things.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Fri Aug 06, 2010 3:55 pm I feel very threatened by his plethora of rocks from Halloween. Even more so then Shinji's mech. We love ya Charlie.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Aug 06, 2010 3:58 pm ...and our Asuka ?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Aug 06, 2010 4:08 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: ...and our Asuka ?

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Fri Aug 06, 2010 4:09 pm Does that make Rei the little red haired girl? Is Linus Kaworu?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Aug 06, 2010 4:10 pm I approve of this.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 02 » Fri Aug 06, 2010 4:18 pm Well at least you got the strong Christian overtones accurately represented.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Aug 06, 2010 4:29 pm Bomby von Bombsville wrote: Does that make Rei the little red haired girl?

[]:             Quote Post by Voland » Fri Aug 06, 2010 4:34 pm and it´s also got it´s tearjerker moments: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vimF66iwheI

[]:             Quote Post by Darkman.exe213 » Fri Aug 06, 2010 4:37 pm I recall seeing the Peanuts characters dressed as Eva characters. But I can't seem to find that image anymore. The closest thing I could find was this on on DeviantArt, and it's nothing alike aside from being from the same two series. http://jeztarzcourt.deviantart.com/art/Shinji-Brown-129345095?q=boost%3Apopular+in%3Afanart+brown&qo=18

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Aug 06, 2010 4:45 pm Rei would be Marcie. Seriously. Megumi Hayashibara even dubs Marcie's Japanese language track. And Kaworu would be Schroeder. They both have that whole Beethoven admiration going for them. And I guess Snoopy would be Pen Pen?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Aug 06, 2010 5:06 pm I felt inspired to do a quick sketch with pens and highlighters. Whee.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Fri Aug 06, 2010 5:15 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: And Kaworu would be Schroeder.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Fri Aug 06, 2010 5:47 pm Some more relevant pix Foodcourt I think I recall one with Rei as Snoopy I think, I'll check to see if I have it.

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Fri Aug 06, 2010 6:17 pm Halicat wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Fri Aug 06, 2010 7:58 pm Halicat wrote: Some more relevant pix Foodcourt I think I recall one with Rei as Snoopy I think, I'll check to see if I have it.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Fri Aug 06, 2010 8:36 pm Halicat wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Aug 06, 2010 8:42 pm JIMBO APPROVES OF THIS THREAD I've loved Peanuts since I was young but I haven't read the comic or seen any of the TV specials in years. This reminds me that I really need to invest in some of those Complete Peanuts sets available on Amazon. And, yes, those NGE/Peanuts pics are priceless.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Fri Aug 06, 2010 8:49 pm Snoopy should be Shinji and Lucy should be Asuka. It would be the perfect set up for the kiss scene: Ack! Ack! Poison Shinji Germs! Get hot water! Get some iodine! Get some disinfectant!
summary:
[]: Evangelion's redundancy in the West             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Aug 06, 2010 3:31 pm We already have our Shinji Ikari:

[]: I come to you as a prophet of sarcasm. Kneel before me.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Fri Aug 06, 2010 3:52 pm This thread is destined for great things.

[]:             Quote Post by Game
